title: 5-Pack Heavy Duty Sticky Pads and Glue Traps for pests - Ultra Sticky & Thick Glue - Multi-Use Sticky Traps for Effective Pest Control - Insect & Pest Catcher Trap
bullet_points: Ultra-Sticky Glue Traps: Extra-strong adhesive ensures effective trapping of pests. Ideal for use around the home, garage, or office.
Heavy-Duty & Durable: Built with robust materials for long-lasting use. Traps hold pests securely upon contact.
Multi-Pest Control: Suitable for capturing various indoor pests, including crawling insects. A versatile solution for any room.
Thick Glue for Maximum Grip: Enhanced glue thickness boosts catch rates—even for faster, more elusive pests.
Safe Indoor Use: Non-toxic and odourless design makes these traps perfect for kitchens, bedrooms, and other living spaces.
